svg.font-family: ui-monospace, SF Mono, Menlo, Consolas, monospace
svg.aria-label: Private emem instance — one binary, any cloud, per-tenant identity and algorithm registries; GPU only on cold foundation-encoder bands
svg.title: emem — private cloud deployment
svg.desc: The same Rust binary that runs emem.dev runs on the customer's cloud of choice (GCP, AWS, Azure, bare metal). Persistent state is a sled cache + ed25519 identity + manifest CIDs on a per-tenant persistent volume; data is anonymous open-data reads from S3, GCS and CDN; receipts are signed content addresses so a private instance interoperates with the public corpus without trust handshake. GPU only fires on cold foundation-encoder bands via a small Python sidecar over UDS — contention is a scheduling problem (batchable, replicable) not a cost problem.

g.text: ONE BINARY · ANY CLOUD · PER-TENANT IDENTITY + ALGORITHM REGISTRIES · GPU ONLY ON COLD FOUNDATION-ENCODER BANDS

forever via the signed-CBOR content address.

Fix: batched worker pool / replicas behind LB.
